name: PACCAR DTC starter (Peterbilt / Kenworth / DAF)
default_source: PACCAR ESA / Davie community SPN/FMI DTCs

dtcs.description: PACCAR MX — Engine oil pressure low warning
PACCAR — J1939 network communication abnormal update rate
PACCAR — Engine exhaust gas pressure 1 sensor circuit voltage low
DPF dP Out of Range (PACCAR MX-11/MX-13)
repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.
2) Inspect the affected sensor / actuator wiring for chafing, corrosion, or loose connectors.
3) Measure circuit resistance + supply voltage with a multimeter.
4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.
5) Replace the defective component if all wiring tests pass.

repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.

4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.

PACCAR — DEF tank level low — engine inducement engaged
